exemplar.title: Certains types de connaissances sont-ils plus utiles que d'autres ?

detailedExemplarData.title: Certains types de connaissances sont-ils plus utiles que d'autres ?

strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with concrete contexts (Apollo Guidance Computer, Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine, Google Maps).
Explicit links made between each object and IA prompt #2 on the âusefulnessâ of different kinds of knowledge.
Many points supported by citations (e.g., Dijkstraâs algorithm reference) and concrete data (e.g., user metrics for Google Maps).
Insightful discussion of interdisciplinary knowledge in the Google Maps example, showing how usefulness emerges from integration.
weaknesses: Analytical depth is uneven; explanations often remain descriptive or rely on broad statements about âuniversal usefulnessâ without deeper TOK nuance.
Argumentation is occasionally incomplete (sentences ending mid-thought, conclusions not tied back to the prompt).
Inconsistent and incomplete citation formatting across sources; missing publisher, dates, URLs and use of non-academic sources.
Lack of TOK terminology (e.g., shared vs. personal knowledge) and insufficient exploration of counter-examples or caveats.
Images are uncaptioned or lack source details, reducing the academic rigor and authenticity of the exhibition.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the requirements for Band 5â6: it identifies three wellâcontextualized objects, links them to IA prompt #2, and provides justifications supported by evidence. However, uneven analytical depth, overgeneralizations, incomplete arguments and inconsistent referencing prevent it from reaching the higher band descriptors. A holistic score of 5 reflects its solid foundation and clear strengths while acknowledging the significant areas for improvement identified in the annotations.

annotations.comment: The introduction outlines the question but doesnât explicitly state its link to IA prompt #2; clarify upfront how âusefulness of knowledgeâ derives from the chosen prompt to strengthen orientation.
Definitions of utility are broad yet remain at surface level; include TOK terminology (e.g. shared vs. personal knowledge) to deepen analysis of what makes knowledge âuseful.â
The image lacks a caption and context; specify its real-world origin and relevance to reinforce the objectâs authenticity and link to the prompt.
Clear identification of a specific real-world object (AGC) demonstrates strong contextual grounding for the exhibition.
Provides precise historical context for the AGC, anchoring its real-world significance in the Apollo 11 mission.
The assertion that AGC knowledge is âaujourdâhui inutileâ is overstated; qualify how its underlying principles (e.g. binary computation) persist to avoid overgeneralization.
The quantitative comparison of AGC vs. iPhone processing power is engaging; extend this by relating it to TOK concepts (e.g. growth of knowledge claims) to deepen theoretical insight.
The concluding sentence restates prior points without further analysis; add an explicit link to how this example illuminates the TOK promptâs focus on usefulness.
The second object (Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine) is clearly identified, with an explicit real-world event enhancing context validity.
The vaccine image is uncaptioned; include a descriptive label and source to validate its authenticity and support the objectâs context.
Thorough explanation of mRNA technology clearly justifies the objectâs selection by linking biomedical knowledge to its real-world impact.
The claim of universal applicability lacks counterbalance; consider discussing scenarios where medical knowledge is contested to add TOK nuance.
Historical linkage to Jenner enriches context; deepen reflection by connecting cumulative medical advancements to TOK ideas of shared knowledge evolution.
This sentence is incomplete and leaves analysis hanging; complete the thought and explicitly tie it back to the prompt on knowledge usefulness.
The stray sentence at the top disrupts flow; integrate this conclusion into a unified summative paragraph to improve coherence.
The figure of Google Maps lacks a caption or citation; include source details to substantiate the objectâs real-world provenance.
Identification of Google Maps as a third object is precise, with date and user metrics grounding its significance.
Insightful discussion of interdisciplinary knowledge (physics, math, engineering, computing) effectively illustrates how usefulness emerges from integration.
The contrast between object types is promising; clarify how Google Mapsâ combined knowledge contrasts with earlier objects in terms of âusefulnessâ rather than mere obsolescence.
Reference to Dijkstraâs algorithm enhances analytical depth by showing how foundational knowledge retains utility across eras.
The paragraph ends mid-thought; ensure complete sentences and link the conclusion back to the central prompt to maintain argumentative precision.
The final summary reiterates object insights but stops before addressing the promptâs overarching TOK question about comparing types of knowledge.
Russell citation format is missing publisher and access date; adhere to consistent referencing style to enhance credibility.
Georgetown University entry lacks URL and publication details; complete all bibliographic fields to support source verification.
Hack Reactor blog is non-academic; consider citing peer-reviewed or authoritative sources to strengthen evidence underpinning the AGC discussion.
Typographical error in URL (âquidanceâ); correct to âguidanceâ to ensure the link resolves and maintains academic rigor.
Medium article citation omits publication date and author credentials; add complete metadata to bolster reference quality.
Inconsistent citation formatting across bibliography; apply a single style (e.g. APA) uniformly for professional presentation.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects

these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not

There is very little
justification offered for

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
